CertAuthority._devNote: Defaults below are relative paths; PlexorCaBootstrap rewrites them to <repo>/dev-certs/... at first boot. Production overrides the entire section via env vars (CertAuthority__CertPath, CertAuthority__HostCertPath, CertAuthority__HostCertPassword) or appsettings.Production.json. Example Linux deploy at /var/lib/plexor/ — see dev-certs/README.md.
